***Childhood*.** *A journal of global child research*, is a quarterly [peer-reviewed](/wiki/Peer-reviewed "Peer-reviewed") [academic journal](/wiki/Academic_journal "Academic journal") covering research in the field of [childhood studies](/wiki/Childhood_studies "Childhood studies"). It was established in 1993 and is published by [SAGE Publishing](/wiki/SAGE_Publishing "SAGE Publishing") in association with the Department of Education and Lifelong Learning ([Norwegian University of Science and Technology](/wiki/Norwegian_University_of_Science_and_Technology "Norwegian University of Science and Technology")). The [editors-in-chief](/wiki/Editors-in-chief "Editors-in-chief") are Tatek Abebe (Norwegian University of Science and Technology), Sarada Balagopalan ([Rutgers University](/wiki/Rutgers_University "Rutgers University")), Karl Hanson ([University of Geneva](/wiki/University_of_Geneva "University of Geneva")), and Spyros Spyrou ([European University Cyprus](/wiki/European_University_Cyprus "European University Cyprus")).

## Abstracting and indexing

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Childhood_(journal)&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Abstracting and indexing")]

The journal is abstracted and indexed in [Current Contents](/wiki/Current_Contents "Current Contents"), [British Humanities Index](/wiki/British_Humanities_Index "British Humanities Index"), [Scopus](/wiki/Scopus "Scopus"), and the [Social Sciences Citation Index](/wiki/Social_Sciences_Citation_Index "Social Sciences Citation Index"). According to the *[Journal Citation Reports](/wiki/Journal_Citation_Reports "Journal Citation Reports")*, the journal has a 2023 [impact factor](/wiki/Impact_factor "Impact factor") of 1.6.[[1]](#cite_note-WoS-1)
